consecutive months, if previously licensed to drive in another state. Students who have lived in Maryland for at least 12 consecutive months but who have held a Maryland driver’s license for less than 12 months will be deemed to have satisﬁed this requirement if they can show evidence that their driver’s license was issued in Maryland within 60 days after moving to the state in accordance with Maryland Motor Vehicle Administration requirements.

6. Receives no public assistance from a state other than the State of

Maryland or from a city, county or municipal agency other than one in Maryland.

7. Has the ability under Federal and Maryland law to live permanently
